summary: Group Deals Discovery Overhaul testing complete. Backend: 11/11 tests pass. Frontend: All features verified - Group Deals List Page with dark hero header, featured deal banner, 3-column deals grid, trust footer; Homepage with Deal of the Day Hero (fallback logic working) and Group Deals Section; Marketplace with Group Deals entry banner showing active count.
seed_data_creation: 14 test deals already exist in database (TEST_DOTD_PRODUCT_*, TEST_DOTD2_PRODUCT_*, TEST_CUSTOMER_GD_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Group Deals Discovery Overhaul fully implemented and tested. Key features verified: 1) /group-deals page loads with dark hero header 'Unlock Lower Prices Together', featured deal banner (auto-picked), 3-column deals grid with 13 cards, trust footer with 3 signals. 2) Homepage shows DealOfTheDayHero with fallback logic (picks best deal if no is_featured) and HomepageGroupDealsSection with 6 featured cards. 3) Marketplace shows Group Deals entry banner with '6 active' badge linking to /group-deals. 4) Deal detail page has share buttons (WhatsApp, Copy Link) and Join Deal CTA. 5) All images have loading='lazy' attribute in code. 6) Backend APIs: GET /api/public/group-deals returns active deals sorted by progress, GET /api/public/group-deals/deal-of-the-day has fallback logic, GET /api/public/group-deals/featured returns top 6.

backend_apis.GET /api/public/group-deals: PASS - Returns 14 active deals sorted by progress (highest first)
backend_apis.GET /api/public/group-deals/featured: PASS - Returns top 6 deals for homepage
backend_apis.GET /api/public/group-deals/deal-of-the-: PASS - Returns best deal with fallback logic (no is_featured required)
backend_apis.GET /api/public/group-deals/{id}: PASS - Returns deal detail with buyer_count, hides vendor_cost/margin fields

frontend_ui.dark_hero_header: PASS - Dark background (#0E1A2B) with 'Unlock Lower Prices Together' title
frontend_ui.featured_deal_banner: PASS - Auto-picked featured deal with 'Join Deal Now' button
frontend_ui.deals_grid: PASS - 3-column grid with 13 deal cards showing progress bars, pricing, savings, timer
frontend_ui.trust_footer: PASS - 3 trust signals: Refund Guaranteed, Verified Payments, Volume Savings
frontend_ui.empty_state: NOT TESTED - Deals exist, empty state not triggered
frontend_ui.deal_detail_page: PASS - Share buttons (WhatsApp, Copy Link), Join Deal CTA, back link
frontend_ui.homepage_deal_of_the_day: PASS - DealOfTheDayHero shows best deal with fallback logic
frontend_ui.homepage_group_deals_section: PASS - 6 featured deal cards with 'View All' button
frontend_ui.marketplace_banner: PASS - Dark banner with '6 active' badge linking to /group-deals
frontend_ui.lazy_loading: PASS - loading='lazy' attribute present in all deal image components

notes: All Group Deals Discovery features working as expected. The deal-of-the-day endpoint correctly falls back to the best active deal when no is_featured flag exists. The marketplace banner conditionally renders only when dealCount > 0. The HomepageGroupDealsSection conditionally renders only when deals.length > 0.
